title: Conostegia ombrophila
taxonomy: Conostegia ombrophila is classified within the family Melastomataceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the "melastome" family. This family is part of the order Myrtales, which includes other families of plants such as the Myrtaceae and the Onagraceae. The order Myrtales is within the clade Rosids, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Conostegia ombrophila is also classified as a species within the genus Conostegia, which is a group of plants endemic to Central and South America. The classification of Conostegia ombrophila reflects its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
